summary: Tested patient reopen/wiedereroeffnen feature end-to-end. Backend: 5 new pytest cases all pass (404 non-existent, 409 non-closed, successful reopen, multi-reopen history growth 1->2, system funk entry logged, wiedereroeffnet_at default list). Full suite 148/153 pass – same 5 pre-existing version/S4 failures as iteration 12 baseline, no new regressions. Frontend: verified KPI toggle Offene/Gesamt with correct counts (4 open / 7 total, '3 abgeschlossen' hint), show-closed FilterChip hides 3 closed patients by default and reveals all 7 when toggled, EL reopen button enabled + confirm modal contains 'In Behandlung' and 'Zeitstempel', reopen API call transitions patient to 'In Behandlung' with timeline-reopen-0 entry and 'Wiedereroeffnet · aktuell offen (1x erneut aufgenommen)' text, reopened patient re-appears in default Offene list, role gating correct (helfer + einsatzleiter enabled; dokumentar, fuehrungsassistenz, abschnittleitung show button but disabled).

minor.issue: Pre-existing 5 failures (hardcoded version asserts 0.2.0/0.4.0/0.5.0/0.6.0 vs current 1.0.0, and S4 sichtung not in Literal). Unrelated to reopen feature.

critical_code_review_comments: routes/patients.py reopen_patient: clean implementation – guards 404/409, appends to wiedereroeffnet_at list, nulls fallabschluss_typ/at, resets verbleib to 'unbekannt', logs system funk entry. Uses find_one_and_update with projection excluding _id. Good.
models.py: Patient.wiedereroeffnet_at: List[datetime] with default_factory=list – backward compatible, serializes cleanly.

PatientList.jsx kpi section: proper dual-mode (kpiMode offen|alle), hint '{abgeschlossen} abgeschlossen' only in alle mode. FilterChip show-closed uses kpis.alle.abgeschlossen as count – matches backend closed count.

PatientDetail.jsx handleReopen: uses PatientContext reopen(), refreshes local state, clears verbleib cache, closes modal. Role gating via can('patient.reopen') – button stays visible but disabled for non-privileged roles (good for discoverability).
EmptyState hasFilter heuristic includes '!showClosed' – correctly shows 'Keine Treffer' prompt when closed patients are hidden and would otherwise be displayed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all reopen + KPI toggle + show-closed assertions pass)

test_credentials: N/A – role-based local-only auth, set via localStorage els-role
seed_data_creation: Created 2 demo incidents via POST /api/incidents/demo during UI run (7 patients each, 3 closed). One patient reopened from entlassen/uebergeben -> in_behandlung as part of flow verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reopen feature is fully green end-to-end. Active incident localStorage key is 'els-active-incident' (NOT 'els-active-incident-id'). Role localStorage key is 'els-role'. Dokumentar/FA/Abschnittleitung render the reopen button with HTML 'disabled' attribute (empty string) – correct. Helfer + Einsatzleiter see enabled button. Reopened patient correctly disappears from 'alle abgeschlossen' count and reappears in default Offene list. Timeline marker for reopen is data-testid='timeline-reopen-0' (idx-based). Multiple reopens append to wiedereroeffnet_at list – verified len 1 -> 2 via PATCH re-close then second POST /reopen.
rca of the issue: Not applicable – feature verification, no bugs found.
